text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Teio, your birthday has arrived, and I'm pleased
to see that you've grown even more dependable
and capable than you were last year.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, McQueen. Hey, don't you think someone
as amazing as me deserves to be celebrated in an
equally amazing way?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, how about you wish me well with a special
birthday message? And make it thick, rich, and
extra! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thick, rich, and extra? You mean like honeyade?
Very well, I'll start with "thick."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Teio, if ever there was a person born to be the
Monarch of the world, it is you. For your
birthday, I offer my loyalty.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah! No need for formalities, but please, continue. Next, lemme know how much you love me... and make it rich! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
L-love?! But I... Perhaps if I copy something I've
seen before...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Um... Being able to celebrate your birthday by your side... brings me great joy—no, should I say delight? Ugh, this is embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Great! Now, an extra present to finish things off. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Stop getting so carried away! Ugh, in that case...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, very well. As you wish, here's a vitamin shot, loaded with an extra long needle! ...Doctor!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wha? AAAAGH! Cut me some slaaack!
